support_levels.parsed: attributes are captured into node state
support_levels.rendered: current render path uses the node meaningfully
support_levels.platform_ready: backend-specific readiness: full, partial, or none

android: Core shapes, gradients, masks, clip paths, and text have dedicated bridges.
Filters are not executed because the Android canvas backend does not override SupportsFilters().
Image rendering depends on a ResourceManager callback.
ios: Core shapes, gradients, masks, clip paths, and text have Quartz/TextKit implementations.
Filters are not executed because the iOS canvas backend does not override SupportsFilters().
Image rendering depends on an image callback.
harmony: Core shapes, gradients, masks, and clip paths are implemented.
Text and image backends are currently incomplete.
Filters are not executed because the Harmony canvas backend does not override SupportsFilters().
skity: Core shapes, gradients, masks, clip paths, and image rendering are implemented.
Filter execution consumes the shared FilterModel but is limited to supported single-input linear chains.

global_notes: Inline style support is property-by-property. A style declaration only works when its property is parsed by the receiving node.
A tag being recognized by the parser does not imply full spec support.
The repository currently relies more on sample SVG assets than on engine-level unit tests for SVG behavior.

partial.width: Root width is commonly present in input SVG, but the renderer uses the external viewport context instead of parsing svg@width.
partial.height: Root height is commonly present in input SVG, but the renderer uses the external viewport context instead of parsing svg@height.
partial.opacity: Container opacity is inherited into children instead of using isolated group compositing.

notes: The root node sets the view box transform and then renders child containers.
CSS transform inside style is handled specially on the root svg node.

partial.opacity: Group opacity is inherited into children instead of using isolated group compositing.

notes: Group attributes such as fill, stroke, mask, and color are propagated to child nodes during render.

parsed_but_not_rendered.transform: Defs is a non-rendering container; its own transform is parsed but not applied as a render step.

notes: Defs is used as a non-rendering container for reusable nodes.

parsed_but_not_rendered.fill: Line rendering only issues a draw call when stroke is present.
parsed_but_not_rendered.fill-rule: Line rendering is stroke-driven; fill-rule does not affect the output.

notes: A line is effectively stroke-only in the current renderer.

parsed_but_not_rendered.width: Width is parsed but not used by SrSVGUse::renderRealNode().
parsed_but_not_rendered.height: Height is parsed but not used by SrSVGUse::renderRealNode().
parsed_but_not_rendered.opacity: Opacity is parsed on use but is not forwarded to the referenced node.

notes: Use renders the referenced node directly from the ID map instead of delegating to platform DrawUse().

partial.x: Image geometry uses raw length values in onDraw(), so percentage and non-px units are not fully audited.
partial.y: Image geometry uses raw length values in onDraw(), so percentage and non-px units are not fully audited.
partial.width: Image geometry uses raw length values in onDraw(), so percentage and non-px units are not fully audited.
partial.height: Image geometry uses raw length values in onDraw(), so percentage and non-px units are not fully audited.

parsed_but_not_rendered.fill: Image drawing bypasses shape fill and stroke state and calls DrawImage() directly.
parsed_but_not_rendered.stroke: Image drawing bypasses shape fill and stroke state and calls DrawImage() directly.
parsed_but_not_rendered.opacity: Image drawing does not consume SrSVGShape render_state opacity.
parsed_but_not_rendered.fill-opacity: Image drawing does not consume SrSVGShape render_state opacity.
parsed_but_not_rendered.stroke-opacity: Image drawing does not consume SrSVGShape render_state opacity.
parsed_but_not_rendered.clip-path: Image does not provide a real AsPath() implementation, so clip-path geometry is unreliable.

notes: Android, iOS, Harmony, and Skity can draw images when the embedding app provides an image callback, fetcher, or resource manager.

partial.style: Inline style is only meaningful for the limited text properties that the paragraph bridge consumes.

parsed_but_not_rendered.stroke: Current text rendering uses paragraph backends and only consumes fill color and font size.
parsed_but_not_rendered.stroke-width: Current text rendering uses paragraph backends and only consumes fill color and font size.
parsed_but_not_rendered.stroke-linecap: Current text rendering uses paragraph backends and only consumes fill color and font size.
parsed_but_not_rendered.stroke-linejoin: Current text rendering uses paragraph backends and only consumes fill color and font size.
parsed_but_not_rendered.stroke-dasharray: Current text rendering uses paragraph backends and only consumes fill color and font size.
parsed_but_not_rendered.stroke-dashoffset: Current text rendering uses paragraph backends and only consumes fill color and font size.
parsed_but_not_rendered.opacity: Text color is not multiplied through the generic SrSVGShape opacity pipeline.
parsed_but_not_rendered.fill-opacity: Text color is not multiplied through the generic SrSVGShape opacity pipeline.
parsed_but_not_rendered.clip-path: Text does not provide a real AsPath() implementation for clip-path geometry.

notes: Android and iOS have paragraph bridges.
Skity and Harmony paragraph factories currently return no drawable paragraph output.

partial.style: Inline style is only meaningful for the limited text properties that the paragraph bridge consumes.

parsed_but_not_rendered.transform: TSpan inherits generic node parsing but the paragraph builder does not apply per-span transforms.
parsed_but_not_rendered.stroke: Current text rendering uses paragraph backends and only consumes fill color and font size.
parsed_but_not_rendered.opacity: Current text rendering does not apply the generic opacity pipeline per span.

notes: TSpan support is limited to paragraph text style accumulation.
Linear gradients are materialized through the canvas UpdateLinearGradient() bridge and then referenced via url(#id).
Android ignores a distinct radial-gradient focus point in the final shader and uses cx/cy for the center.
Pattern definitions are resolved lazily when shapes reference url(#pattern-id).
All current backends support vector pattern fill and stroke through resolver-driven tile rendering.
Pattern stroke participates in vector-effect="non-scaling-stroke" through device-space stroke clipping.

parsed_but_not_rendered.transform: ClipPath inherits container parsing, but its AsPath() path union does not apply the container transform.

notes: Clip paths are converted to canvas clip operations through SrSVGNode::OnPrepareToRender().
Mask rendering uses SaveLayer plus destination-in compositing on all current backends.

partial.primitiveUnits: Primitive units are resolved into the shared FilterModel, but execution still depends on backend-supported filter primitives.

notes: The shared SVG layer resolves the W3C filter region and builds a FilterModel for filter primitives.
Filter execution only happens when the canvas backend supports the generated FilterModel.
At present only Skity exposes a runtime filter executor, and it is limited to single-input linear chains.

partial.in: Filter graph input is resolved in the shared FilterModel, but Skity currently executes only SourceGraphic-rooted single-input linear chains.
partial.result: Filter result chaining is resolved in the shared FilterModel, but backend execution is still limited to supported linear chains.
partial.x: Primitive subregions are resolved in the shared FilterModel, but Skity currently executes only primitives whose subregion equals the filter region.
partial.y: Primitive subregions are resolved in the shared FilterModel, but Skity currently executes only primitives whose subregion equals the filter region.
partial.width: Primitive subregions are resolved in the shared FilterModel, but Skity currently executes only primitives whose subregion equals the filter region.
partial.height: Primitive subregions are resolved in the shared FilterModel, but Skity currently executes only primitives whose subregion equals the filter region.

notes: Skity can execute feGaussianBlur in supported single-input linear chains.

partial.in: Filter graph input is resolved in the shared FilterModel, but Skity currently executes only SourceGraphic-rooted single-input linear chains.
partial.result: Filter result chaining is resolved in the shared FilterModel, but backend execution is still limited to supported linear chains.
partial.x: Primitive subregions are resolved in the shared FilterModel, but Skity currently executes only primitives whose subregion equals the filter region.
partial.y: Primitive subregions are resolved in the shared FilterModel, but Skity currently executes only primitives whose subregion equals the filter region.
partial.width: Primitive subregions are resolved in the shared FilterModel, but Skity currently executes only primitives whose subregion equals the filter region.
partial.height: Primitive subregions are resolved in the shared FilterModel, but Skity currently executes only primitives whose subregion equals the filter region.

notes: Skity can execute feOffset in supported single-input linear chains.

partial.type: Skity executes matrix and luminanceToAlpha color matrices in supported linear chains; other color matrix types are parsed but not executed.
partial.in: Filter graph input is resolved in the shared FilterModel, but Skity currently executes only SourceGraphic-rooted single-input linear chains.
partial.result: Filter result chaining is resolved in the shared FilterModel, but backend execution is still limited to supported linear chains.
partial.x: Primitive subregions are resolved in the shared FilterModel, but Skity currently executes only primitives whose subregion equals the filter region.
partial.y: Primitive subregions are resolved in the shared FilterModel, but Skity currently executes only primitives whose subregion equals the filter region.
partial.width: Primitive subregions are resolved in the shared FilterModel, but Skity currently executes only primitives whose subregion equals the filter region.
partial.height: Primitive subregions are resolved in the shared FilterModel, but Skity currently executes only primitives whose subregion equals the filter region.

notes: Skity can execute feColorMatrix in supported single-input linear chains.

parsed_but_not_rendered.in: Filter input graph selection is captured in the shared FilterModel but no backend executes feComposite yet.
parsed_but_not_rendered.in2: Composite inputs are captured in the shared FilterModel but no backend executes feComposite yet.
parsed_but_not_rendered.operator: Composite operator is captured in the shared FilterModel but no backend executes feComposite yet.
